data.title: Remove ansible plugin/references from zsh config files
data.description:
## Problem

Several zsh config files reference ansible as a tool/plugin manager:

### `dot_zshrc` (line 73)

```
plugins=(git vim-interaction vi-mode ansible ssh-agent)
```

Remove `ansible` from the plugins list.

### `dot_zshrc-skogix` (lines 43, 280)

```
zplug "plugins/ansible", from:oh-my-zsh    # Requires ansible to be installed
# export ANSIBLE_HOME="$XDG_DATA_HOME"/ansible
```

Remove the zplug ansible plugin line and the commented ANSIBLE_HOME export.

### `dot_zshrc-zinit` (lines 9, 37, 41, 44)

```
# Generated by Ansible - Role: zsh
# Source local customizations if present (not managed by ansible)
# Managed by Ansible
# 1. Edit vars/zsh.yml in the ansible repository
```

Remove/rewrite these comments to reflect chezmoi-native management.

## Acceptance criteria

* No ansible plugin loaded in any zsh config
* No ansible-related comments or env vars remain
